title: balance_with_confirmations: scan_tip and notes read in separate queries, inconsistent snapshot
description: db.rs balance_with_confirmations calls scan_tip() then balance() as two separate SQLite queries. The scanner can commit save_block_state (which advances tip + writes new witnesses) between the two calls. balance() then uses a tip from time T but counts notes that arrived at time T+1. Result: notes received in the window between the two calls are counted as pending at the old tip depth instead of the correct depth. A two-way inconsistency: balance can show slightly more or fewer confirmed zatoshi than reality.
